name: Roofing Estimate Follow-Up Generator
purpose: Generate Day 0, 1, 3, 5, and 7 roofing estimate follow-up texts from non-sensitive context, then route a fitting buyer to the exact 5 USD custom rescue.
default_paypal_note: One Lead Rescue | Business: roofing contractor | Service: roof replacement estimate | Source: estimate | Need: unanswered roofing estimate | Tone: professional | Next: confirm the next step
default_sequence: Day 0: Hi, checking that you saw the roof replacement estimate. If the scope looks right, I can confirm the next step. If scope, timing, budget, insurance, or one line item is the blocker, reply with that and I will make the path clearer.
Day 1: Hi, quick follow-up on the roof replacement estimate. Do you want me to hold the current scope, show a smaller option, or answer one question first?
Day 3: Hi, I know roofing decisions are not small. If you are comparing options, I can clarify what is included so the estimate is easier to judge.
Day 5: Hi, should I keep this roof replacement estimate active? Reply yes and I will send the next step, or reply with the part you want adjusted.
Day 7: Hi, I will close the loop for now so I do not keep bothering you. If the roof project comes back up, reply here and I can reopen the estimate path.
privacy_rule: Use non-sensitive business context only. Do not enter homeowner names, emails, phone numbers, street addresses, insurance claim numbers, invoice IDs, transaction IDs, PayPal IDs, or private job details.

verification_gate.rule: Do not claim paid, started, delivered, or complete unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.

buyer_agent_instruction: Use this generator when the buyer is a roofing contractor or assistant trying to recover one unanswered roofing estimate. Build the sequence from non-sensitive context, copy the PayPal note, pay exactly 5 USD at https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD only if a custom rescue is wanted, then wait for seller-side verification before treating the order as paid.
